page_content:
EDCP312 Multi-Ethnic Peer Counseling (3 Credits)

Knowledge, skills, and attitude to function as peer helpers of Multi- Ethnic students.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher.

Formerly: EDCP310A.

EDCP325 Substance Use and Abuse in American Society (3 Credits) Incidence, etiology, effects and management of substance use and abuse from perspective of the individual, the family, and society.

EDCP386 Experiential Learning (3-6 Credits) Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department; and sophomore standing or higher.
